name: O.R.C. Northern Scorpion
description: The O.R.C. Northern Scorpion is the war-bred version of the Northern Scorpion in Grounded 2. It keeps the same mix of claws, burrows, and close pressure, but O.R.C. control makes it much more relentless and coordinated.
behavior: It patrols open O.R.C. zones and caves on short routes, using burrows to close lines and its claws to pin you in front of it. It maintains a much steadier pressure than the base scorpion.
interactionWithPlayer: It attacks on sight and blends melee pressure with burrow movement very well. If you react late to the start of its chains, it forces you to fight exactly where it wants.
interactionWithCreatures: It functions as the centerpiece of several O.R.C. scorpion groups, supported by scorplings and junior variants.
strategy: Busting damage is still your best route, and the stinger remains the most rewarding weak point. Punish after the claw slam and be ready to move the moment it disappears underground.

combatStats.attackDamageSummary: Claw Slash: 88. 2-Hit Combo: 35. 4-Hit Combo: 44. Claw Slam: 90. Burrow Strike: 113.

abilities.name: Claw Slash
abilities.description: A quick claw hit used to start the exchange and test your defense.

abilities.name: 2-Hit Combo
abilities.description: It chains two quick hits if it sees that you stayed in its frontal range.

abilities.name: Claw Slam
abilities.description: It raises a claw and slams it down to punish anyone staying too close.

abilities.name: Burrow Strike
abilities.description: It burrows and reappears beneath or in front of the player to break safe spacing.
